texto: Business is religion and religion is business. The man who does not make a business of his religion has a religious life of no force and the man who does not make a religion of his business has a business life of no character.
explicacao: Citação de Maltbie Babcock sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Business is religion and religion is business. The man who does not make a business of his religi…” articula reflexao, business, religion em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
